summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Sophus Capital Emerging Market ETF (EMEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through exposure toemergingmarketequities across all market capitalizations. Companyselectionuses a proprietary quantitative system.

holdings.infoBox: EMEM is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 15.59%, Samsung Electronics at 8.87%, SK hynix at 4.47%, Tencent Holdings at 4.09%, and MediaTek at 1.85%.
